name: Triliumnext
tagline: Build your personal knowledge base with TriliumNext Notes.
description:
Build your personal knowledge base with TriliumNext Notes.

Docs: https://github.com/TriliumNext/Trilium?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  triliumnext:
    image: ghcr.io/triliumnext/trilium:stable
    platform: linux/amd64
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ:-Europe/Berlin}
    volumes:
      - triliumnext_data:/home/node/trilium-data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - wget --quiet --tries=1 --spider http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/health-check || exit 1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42128:8080
volumes:
  triliumnext_data: null
